metadata.title:
BUY BREEDING


BEEF CATTLE NOW

Prices Lowsst for Ysars-Lay Foun-


dation for High Glass Herd.

pages.raw_text:
Pure bred beef cattle are now SELL
ing for less money than for years.
When beef brought high prices in the
market, there were plenty of buyers
for pure bred breeding stun. Prices
went away up, too high. in fact. for
the good of the breeding business.
Many new men loaded up at these
boom prices. and now are disguised
and unloading at half or third the
prices they bought for.


A number OF breeders were embar-
assed financially to such an extent as
to be seriously crippled for years.
probably for life. by injudicious buy
Ing at the boom prices of four or five
years ago.


But now. high-class breeding stock
can be bought for what II is worth.
In many cases less than its real val
